'''Fellon''' was a major port [[City/Legends|city]] on [[Halmad/Legends|Halmad]]. A small [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Fellon base|base]] was located here before being destroyed during [[Halmad campaign|Operation Groundquake]].

{{City-stub}}
